Name: FilterManager Page
Description: Top-menu entry FilterManager opens this page component.

Name: Top Navigation Hook
Description: selectedMenu === 'FilterManager' renders <FilterManager />.

Name: FilterManager (Main Container)
Description: Main orchestration component for filter list CRUD and modal workflow.

Name: Header Action Bar
Description: Refresh action and Create New Filter trigger.

Name: Filter List Section
Description: Displays all filters with selection controls and bulk actions.

Name: Filter List Item Card
Description: Per-filter card with metadata badges and action buttons.

Name: Edit Action
Description: Opens modal in edit mode for selected filter.

Name: Duplicate Action
Description: Clones selected filter and saves as a new record.

Name: Delete Action
Description: Deletes selected filter via API flow.

Name: Summary Panel
Description: Shows aggregate counts like Total Active and With API.

Name: Quick Actions Panel
Description: Select All and Clear Selection operations.

Name: Create/Edit Modal Shell
Description: Overlay modal host for create or edit filter flows.

Name: ThemeProvider Wrapper
Description: Wraps modal content with theme context and root dark class support.

Name: BasicTab Editor
Description: Main filter editor form component used for both create and edit.

Name: Tab Navigation
Description: Switches between editing areas basic styling events validation options and queryBuilder.

Name: Basic Tab Content
Description: Core filter properties like name type field default and visibility settings.

Name: Styling Tab Content
Description: CSS class and inline style configuration UI.

Name: Events Tab Content
Description: Event handler bindings like onClick onChange onFocus onKeyDown.

Name: Validation Tab Content
Description: Validation constraints such as required min max pattern and related checks.

Name: Options Tab Content
Description: Static or dynamic options and selection behavior configuration.

Name: QueryBuilder Tab Content
Description: Advanced SQL-like query builder setup for dynamic data-driven filters.

Name: Join Configuration Accordion
Description: Join type primary secondary table and join condition setup.

Name: Where Conditions Accordion
Description: Configures filter clauses operators and grouped conditions.

Name: Window Functions Accordion
Description: Defines ranking aggregate and analytic window expressions.

Name: NestedQueryBuilder
Description: Recursive nested query editor for advanced condition composition.

Name: UI Helper Component IconButton
Description: Reusable icon action button used across list actions.

Name: UI Helper Component Badge
Description: Reusable status and metadata badge element.

Name: DashboardManager Page
Description: Top-menu entry DashboardManager opens this page component.

Name: Top Navigation Hook
Description: selectedMenu === 'DashboardManager' renders <DashboardManager />.

Name: DashboardManager (Main Container)
Description: Main orchestration component: tabs, CRUD, layout, API integration.

Name: Header Actions Bar
Description: Buttons: Create Dashboard, Drag Mode, tab switches, Refresh.

Name: Dashboards Tab
Description: Shows dashboard cards and selected dashboard visual area.

Name: Widgets Tab
Description: Tabular widget management (edit/delete/add/refresh).

Name: Data Sources Tab
Description: Tabular data source management.

Name: Create Context Menu Tab
Description: Loads separate context-menu management component.

Name: Assign Filters Tab
Description: Loads separate filter-assignment component and assignment grid.

Name: DashboardCard
Description: Individual dashboard tile with select/edit/delete/drop handling.

Name: Selected Dashboard Panel
Description: Displays selected dashboard info and widget grid container.

Name: GridLayout (Widget Canvas)
Description: Responsive drag/resize layout for widgets.

Name: WidgetComponent
Description: Per-widget renderer with data + type-based UI rendering.

Name: KPIView
Description: KPI value/trend visual display.

Name: Chart Renderer Block
Description: Renders chart-like visuals from normalized data.

Name: Table Renderer Block
Description: Renders normalized table rows/columns.

Name: Text Renderer Block
Description: Renders textual widget content.

Name: Map Renderer Block
Description: MAP type logic with dynamic leaflet component loading.

Name: RecursiveMenu
Description: Nested context-menu rendering tree.

Name: DashboardModal
Description: Create/Edit dashboard modal.

Name: WidgetModal
Description: Create/Edit widget modal + preview + config fields.

Name: DataSourceModal
Description: Create/Edit datasource modal with JSON config fields.

Name: ContextMenuTab (Separate Component)
Description: Full CRUD for context menus and widget-context assignments.

Name: AssignFiltersTab (Separate Component)
Description: Assign filters at dashboard/widget scope.

Name: MapWidget (Separate Component dynamic)
Description: Dynamically imported map widget for MAP visual type.
